name: Captain ToonHead vs The Punks from Outer Space

reviews.review_title: I know they can’t read this but
reviews.review_description: This is the most addicting tower defense game I’ve ever played and it is the best one. I never liked tower defense games but this one is a must play.

developer_response.body:
We read everything...

We're so glad you're enjoying Captain Toonhead!

reviews.review_description:
I love this twist on Tower defense games! I've only completed mission 1 with 3 levels so far. We all enjoy the game in my family.
The only thing I don't like is the dialogue but that's just me. Good game

There aren't a ton of tower defense games on the Quest and this one has you boots on the ground with the rest of your troops. Really a unique take on the genre with the added bonus of a fun story that will have you laughing. Pick it up at this price!

I would love a sandbox mode where you can build your own level or build on a current one. You could also have instant upgrades and a spawn menu where you can spawn enemies. I would love this as a feature

So before you will start playing this game may feel annoying, but trust me - just skip all dialogues and move straight to playing and you will love this game! Variety of enemies is not to big, but they have some variations that makes game more challenging. Definitely worth trying.
Only slightly annoying thing during playing is that you use the same button to buy towers and teleport to them, so usually straight after putting new one you are moving to it, but it's not to big problem.

This is one of if not the best VR experiences I have ever played. everything about it is perfect the humor, the art, the atmosphere, the gameplay, and the only thing that I don’t like is that I didn’t find it sooner

People on here write template reviews and they are terrible. Or they just say 5 stars good game! Or trash a game for small reasons. 

Captain Toonhead is an amazingly intricate and well-crafted game. It oozes style with graphics that have a super art style. The particle effects shine and the cartoony graphics do it justice.

You run into anthropomorphic burrito in one of the first scenes and the humor doesn't let up. The controls are remarkably well thought out and you'll be effortlessly placing turrets around the battlefield, whipping yourself around to control them and shoot the hordes.

I'm a fan and I hope they continue to improve it with new maps and perhaps a deeper meta. As it is, it's worth the buy and you'll enjoy what the developer has created here if you're a fan of tower defense FPSs. I applaud the devs as this is what I'm looking for on Quest 2. Completely new experiences where you feel nostalgic and transported into another world.

developer_response.body:
Hi, Spencer J.W.

LD here, nice to review-meet you! I’m the dude who directed the game. I asked permission from our incredibly reliable community management team, only because your review moved us deeply and I felt compelled to respond to you personally. 

First of all, THANK YOU SO SO SO MUCH for taking the time to review the game with care. You’re helping our indie title more than you think with this action. You’re not only supporting our game to become more visible to others, but you've also, more importantly, made dozens of GameDevs that poured their souls, dreams and passions into Captain ToonHead so incredibly happy and proud. 

Players’ voices mean everything to us, because we were Players before we became GameDevs. We chose this intricate profession mainly because we want to make others feel like we felt when we played those games that changed our lives in the past. We want to pay forward the hours of sheer joy, the lessons in perseverance, the mental calisthenics, the inspiring stories and the audiovisual grace that we got from Video Games when we needed it the most. We want our games to be emotional time machines for players to transport themselves into that, sometimes forgotten, cozy feeling you used to trigger when you were a kid and it was easy to let yourself be happy by playing games you like. 

Thank you for playing and for paying attention. It would be a complete honor if you join us in the game’s discord server ( https://discord.gg/aKdq9WdEsg ) and please STAY TOONED because a new Survival Mode is coming soon!


You perked our day up. Keep doing you. You are cool.

reviews.review_description: This game is great, if you like tower defense game this is for you. This game is very challenging, and yet the game play and the controls are easy enough to get used to. I like the fact your main guns are unlimited and you never have to worry about reloading. All the weapon upgrades work well when you get further into the game. I’ve played this game 3 times through and will keep coming back for more. I really hope the creators make a sequel to this game. I would definitely recommend this game.

Save $$$ with this code 
https://www.oculus.com/appreferrals/GreatBandini/3697657733661230/?utm_source=3

reviews.review_title: Most fun I’ve had so far
reviews.review_description:
I was looking for a game to play other than the normal arm swinging ones I love so much.  I’ve never really cared for tower defense games much, but the glowing reviews led me to try this game, and I can’t get enough of it.  Haven’t played anything else since I started.  It does take some strategy, and it’s a lot of fun, made me laugh a couple times too.   

This is my first review that I have ever left for a game, that’s how much I loved this.  If the developers read this review, please come out with a second one, or more like this.
I love!!!!!!!!!! This game... But there isn't enough levels... And I wish there was an infante level

developer_response.body:
Thanks atreaujg ! we love that you love Captain ToonHead! :D
The infinite level is an awesome idea and I can't confirm nor deny that we are already designing something along those lines ;)
Stay Tooned!

reviews.review_description: this game is extremely fun

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun and very cool
reviews.review_description: About 2 hours played. This game is very fun!!!!! Looks great and feels smooth for so much going on at once. Ill let the kids play after im done 😆.
Out the gate the games is great.   However, once I get to a certain point in the game , it gets stuck on pause.  Hopefully this is correct soon so I can continue playing it.

developer_response.body:
Update March 17 2022:
Hi wolfpack2021!
We're happy to report that an update is available and it should fix the pause issue! Check it out and let us know!

More details on this Gnarly update here:
https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/1696028637395537/

Also, we'll keep improving and expanding the game, so stay Tooned!
------------------------------
Hi wofepack2021!
Thanks for the nice comments about the game!
We are sorry this is happening to you :( We haven't seen this issue before. Can you join our Discord https://discord.gg/DHCpPtQ and ping us on the bug-report channel so we can further assist you? With more information we'll be able to determine what's going on so you can continue to enjoy Captain ToonHead!

reviews.review_description: Enjoying this so far.

I have honestly never had had this much fun in a VR game. Not only does it require thinking, and strategy (And maybe a bit a aim), but the weapons and enemies are both hilarious and awesome! From harnessing the power of fireworks and hot sauce, to wielding your grandmothers flying chanclas, (a kind of shoe), this game is a silly, eye rolling, masterpiece! Heads up though, there is some slight language.

developer_response.body: We LOVE your review O_Megamon. "silly, eye rolling, masterpiece!" might be the best description we have read so far for Captain ToonHead :D Thanks for playing and if you want to share with other toonheads join our Discord: https://discord.gg/DHCpPtQ

reviews.review_description: What a great game!! It´s amazing what you guys did here! I´m loving the story, a lot of humor in it, and the graphics are great as well. The game is fun and keeps me engaged in the story.

This is very fun game that I can’t stop playing. If you like games that you put towers and monsters try to cam and walk through so this is the game for you.
Very recommended

I bought this game as part of a pack in a sale, and had no expectation. I'm not really a fan of this type of game either, but I gave it a go anyway.

I did find the set up a bit tedious, but once you get into this game it's a lot of hectic fun.

Management of the canons and upgrades is tough to master, but not too hard to put casual players off.
I don’t write reviews often but this is a tower defense first person shooter That has a skill tree it’s very cool
